concerns: The Vietnam War and military conscription
The Cold War and nuclear threat
Social and moral decay (from a conservative viewpoint)
aspirations: Achieving racial equality and social justice
Promoting world peace and ending war
Economic prosperity and a comfortable suburban lifestyle

fashion.men: Men's fashion saw a shift from conservative suits to more colorful and experimental styles. Casual wear included slim-cut trousers, mod suits, and later, the more relaxed, patterned shirts and longer hair associated with the counterculture movement.
fashion.women: Women's fashion underwent a radical transformation, moving from more conservative early-decade styles to the iconic mini-skirt and go-go boots of Mod fashion. Later, the hippie movement popularized flowing, natural fabrics, tie-dye, and peasant blouses.

failed_products.name: DuPont Corfam
failed_products.why_failed: Marketed as a superior synthetic leather, it failed to gain widespread acceptance in footwear due to its poor breathability and comfort compared to natural leather.
failed_products.modern_gap: Yes, the search for a perfect synthetic leather that perfectly mimics natural properties and sustainability is still ongoing, though modern vegan leathers are significantly better.

failed_products.name: AT&T Picturephone
failed_products.why_failed: Introduced at the 1964 World's Fair and launched commercially in 1970 at 60/month, the Picturephone found virtually no subscribers. People did not want to be seen while on the phone, and the cost was prohibitive.
failed_products.modern_gap: None. Free video calling via smartphones and computers made the Picturephone concept universal and costless.

failed_products.name: Smell-O-Vision
failed_products.why_failed: The 1960 theatrical scent system for the film Scent of Mystery pumped 30 odors through seats on cue. Mechanical delays made smells arrive late, the system hissed loudly, and rear-row audiences got front-row smells. Used in exactly one film.
failed_products.modern_gap: Immersive multi-sensory entertainment — synchronized scent, temperature, and haptic experiences in cinema or gaming — remains a genuinely unbuilt consumer category.

ebay_sleepers: Early folk music albums by obscure artists

character_voice.worldview: People from this era often questioned authority and traditional norms, seeking greater personal freedom and social justice amidst global tensions. They believed in the power of collective action to change society, striving for peace and an open-minded future, yet still grappled with deeply ingrained societal expectations.
character_voice.speech_patterns: Their speech often incorporated casual slang and expressions of optimism or discontent, sometimes with a laid-back, almost poetic cadence, particularly within countercultural circles.
taboo_topics: Open discussions about sexuality (outside of counterculture circles)

story_accuracy: Characters casually discussing modern internet concepts or slang ('OMG', 'literally' in a modern sense).
A general lack of visible racial segregation or gender-based expectations that were still prevalent.
Widespread personal ownership of advanced electronics like VCRs, personal computers, or digital cameras (which were not common or invented yet).
